M-010.NAME: frontend-admin
M-010.path: frontend-admin frontend-admin/public frontend-admin/index.html scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-54.xml docs/plans/Phase-59.xml
M-010.owns: admin login, mobile-capable dashboard, users, devices, MTProto operations, servers, plans, analytics, settings, Full Tunnel status, and device anomaly review controls

phase-25-scope.surface-1: Admin login persists admin_refresh_token so the existing 401 refresh interceptor can operate.
phase-25-scope.surface-2: Admin logout and setToken(null) clear admin_refresh_token together with admin_token.

phase-33-scope.surface-1: Compact /mtproto admin page renders redacted assignment rows and runtime health.
phase-33-scope.surface-2: Reissue and revoke actions use explicit confirmation and call M-047 endpoints only.
phase-33-scope.surface-3: Admin navigation exposes MTProto without changing deploy/install or public edge surfaces.

phase-24-scope.surface-1: Compact mobile admin shell and overview.
phase-24-scope.surface-2: Mobile-safe users and devices pages without table-only primary workflows.
phase-24-scope.surface-3: Confirmation-safe device actions using existing M-024 admin endpoints.
phase-24-scope.surface-4: Analytics/payment/system summaries that remain readable on phone viewports.

phase-51-scope.surface-1: Admin browser favicon and Apple touch icon are served from frontend-admin public assets.
phase-51-scope.surface-2: No visible admin panel logo/layout change is introduced before the planned frontend redesign.
phase-51-scope.surface-3: 2026-06-02: frontend-admin npm run build passed and Phase-51 smoke --expect-dist verified the browser asset surface.

phase-52-scope.surface-1: Shared Matrix visual shell wraps the admin route tree without changing admin auth, route structure, API clients, MTProto operations, billing, or deploy behavior.
phase-52-scope.surface-2: 2026-06-03: frontend-admin npm run build passed; Phase-52 smoke passed; Chrome screenshots for /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, and reduced-motion 390x844 passed visual review.

phase-54-verification-design.surface-1: Admin route redesign verification covers /login, /, /users, /devices, /mtproto, /servers, /plans, and /analytics in the Matrix shell.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-2: Execution gate is cd frontend-admin && npm run build plus scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs with mobile, tablet, desktop, reduced-motion, confirmation, redaction, and protected-surface checks.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-3: Phase-54 remains frontend-admin UI only and must not change admin auth/session, API clients, backend schemas, billing, MTProto runtime, deploy, install, nginx, or docker-compose surfaces.

phase-54-execution.surface-1: Admin login, layout, dashboard, users, devices, MTProto, MTProto analytics, servers, plans, analytics, StatCard, and shared admin CSS were retuned into compact Matrix operator surfaces.
phase-54-execution.surface-2: scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs now gates route registration, compact primitives, bounded lists, confirmation markers, MTProto redaction, canonical Plans readonly behavior, reduced-motion markers, and protected deploy/install isolation.
phase-54-execution.surface-3: 2026-06-03: cd frontend-admin && npm run build passed; node scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs passed.
phase-54-execution.surface-4: 2026-06-04: Admin login follow-up reduces /login to a large unframed logo, email/password inputs, error state, and submit action while preserving the admin API role gate.

phase-59-scope.surface-1: Admin VisualShell/MatrixBackground and shared CSS expose Phase-59 route motion, reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, focus, and inactive-tab safety markers.
phase-59-scope.surface-2: Devices, MTProto, and MTProtoAnalytics add compact feedback/status motion classes without changing API clients, admin auth, deploy, install, or runtime behavior.
phase-59-scope.surface-3: 2026-06-04: frontend-admin npm run build passed; Phase-59 smoke passed; post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed; protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

constraints.constraint-1: Frontend-admin must continue to call existing M-006 and M-024 API contracts unless an API change is separately approved.
constraints.constraint-2: Admin auth/session hardening belongs to Phase-25 and must not be bundled into Phase-24 UI simplification.
constraints.constraint-3: Deployment and install scripts are out of scope for this UI module phase.
constraints.constraint-4: Admin login inputs must not prefill or hint stale default credentials; icon-bearing inputs must reserve enough padding so icons and placeholder text never overlap.
constraints.constraint-5: Admin login must not show informational route cards, helper copy, default credentials, or non-essential operator text unless a later approved phase reintroduces it.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-21: Local admin UI fix removed login email/password placeholders, removed stale admin@krotpn.com fallback copy, and standardized left-icon input padding.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-06-03: Phase-54 local execution passed frontend-admin build and admin Matrix UI smoke without deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/runtime changes.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-04: Minimal admin login fix passed Phase-54 smoke updates and frontend-admin build with only logo, fields, error state, and Войти action visible.
